npcs.prompt:
Create a detailed sports car using Reference_Car as the style, proportions, detail density, and editable color-region
  reference. Do not export the reference car itself. Build a new low-poly game-ready car with a strong silhouette, detailed
  body panels, wheels, headlights, taillights, windows, mirrors, grille, trim, door handles, and subtle idle animation. Keep
  color editing semantic with only major regions like Body Paint, Windows, Wheels, Lights, Trim, and Accent.
npcs.name: Create a detailed
